overall.description: First-person cockpit view from an AS350 helicopter flying through a dense fog-shrouded modern city during golden hour. The aircraft navigates between skyscrapers, passes a prominent communications tower, and transitions to flying over coastal waters with scattered islands visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown skyscraper district in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter through fog-shrouded downtown skyscrapers, maintaining steady altitude while navigating between tall buildings

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter dashboard with flight instruments and GPS visible in foreground
tall modern glass office towers partially obscured by dense fog
dense cluster of high-rise buildings fading into the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies through a dense urban canyon of modern skyscrapers shrouded in heavy golden-hour fog. The instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground while glass towers loom and fade into the mist on all sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: landmark communications tower approach and passage

events.description: helicopter banks right to navigate around the tall tower structure
passing the tower reveals open water and coastline to the right

agents.ego_description: maneuvering helicopter around the tall communications tower, banking right to maintain clearance

entered.detail: tall concrete communications tower with observation pod near the top

segments.scene_description: The helicopter approaches and banks around a prominent communications tower that dominates the foggy skyline. As the aircraft passes the structure, the urban landscape transitions to reveal coastal waters on the right side.

events.description: transition from urban environment to open water coastal area

agents.ego_description: flying over coastal waters toward forested islands visible through the haze

entered.detail: calm water surface reflecting the golden foggy light
small islands with dense tree cover scattered across the water

segments.scene_description: Leaving the city behind, the helicopter flies over open coastal waters with scattered forested islands visible through the persistent fog. The urban skyline fades into the background as the aircraft continues over the water toward the distant shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as the helicopter navigates from a dense urban canyon into an open coastal seascape. It begins by gliding through a cluster of modern skyscrapers shrouded in heavy golden-hour fog, with the instrument panel remaining fixed in the foreground as glass towers loom and fade into the mist. As the aircraft banks around a prominent communications tower dominating the skyline, the urban landscape begins to give way to glimpses of coastal waters on the right. The scene then shifts away from the city, leaving the fading skyline behind to fly over open water where scattered forested islands emerge through the persistent haze. Finally, the camera continues its trajectory over the sea, moving steadily toward a distant shoreline.
